content: brain.js NeuralNetwork.train() takes iterations/errorThresh/learningRate config; .run() does a forward pass only. For continuous single-sample updates there is a stream/pipe API, but no built-in small-dataset regularization. General FFN pitfall with tiny/skewed datasets is memorization/overfitting rather than generalization -- relevant since this project has only 4 hand-authored cold-start examples plus sparse session-end labels.
